recommendations.title: The Hawks and the Sparrows
recommendations.overview: A man and his son take an allegorical stroll through life with a talking bird that spouts social and political philosophy.

recommendations.title: The Canterbury Tales
recommendations.overview: Glimpses of Chaucer penning his famous work are sprinkled through this re-enactment of several of his stories.

recommendations.title: Accattone
recommendations.overview: A pimp with no other means to provide for himself finds his life spiralling out of control when his prostitute is sent to prison.

recommendations.title: Medea
recommendations.overview: Based on the plot of Euripides' Medea. Medea centers on the barbarian protagonist as she finds her position in the Greek world threatened, and the revenge she takes against her husband Jason who has betrayed her for another woman.

recommendations.title: Theorem
recommendations.overview: A wealthy Italian household is turned upside down when a handsome stranger arrives, seduces every family member and then disappears. Each has an epiphany of sorts, but none can figure out who the seductive visitor was or why he came.

recommendations.title: Salò, or the 120 Days of Sodom
recommendations.overview: Four corrupted fascist libertines round up 9 teenage boys and girls and subject them to 120 days of sadistic physical, mental and sexual torture.

recommendations.title: Mamma Roma
recommendations.overview: After years spent working as a prostitute in her Italian village, middle-aged Mamma Roma has saved enough money to buy herself a fruit stand so that she can have a respectable middle-class life and reestablish contact with the 16-year-old son she aba

recommendations.title: The Gospel According to St. Matthew
recommendations.overview: Along a rocky, barren coastline, Jesus begins teaching, primarily using parables. He attracts disciples; he's stern, brusque, and demanding. His parables often take on the powers that be, so he and his teachings come to the attention of the Pharisees

recommendations.title: Fantomas vs. Scotland Yard
recommendations.overview: In the third and final episode of the trilogy, Fantômas imposes a head tax on the rich, threatening to kill those who do not comply.

recommendations.title: Ro.Go.Pa.G.
recommendations.overview: Four short films by four different directors dealing with the principles of modern life.
recommendations.director: Pier Paolo Pasolini, Jean-Luc Godard, Ugo Gregoretti, Roberto Rossellini
